content.speakerText: We gotta celebrate this! Dinner on me this Friday?
content.speakerTextCn: 咱们得庆祝一下！这周五我请客吃饭？

options.text: Absolutely! I’ve been dying to treat you anyway.
I’m not sure I can make it—I’m busy.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了对方的热情提议，并用 'I’ve been dying to treat you' 表达了同样想请客的意愿，符合自然口语和社交礼仪。选项1错误地反转了请客方；选项3是拒绝，不符合积极庆祝的语境；选项4质疑庆祝理由，显得不礼貌且不合时宜。

content.speakerText: I’m so grateful—this means a lot to me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很感激，这对我意义重大。

options.text: You deserve every bit of it. Let’s make it a night to remember!

content.explanation: 正确答案通过 'You deserve every bit of it' 肯定对方成就，并用 'make it a night to remember' 提升情感氛围，是高情商回应。选项1虽正确但过于平淡；选项3贬低自己，不合语境；选项4拒绝庆祝，完全违背场景意图。

content.speakerText: I just got promoted! Let’s do something special this weekend.
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚升职了！这个周末我们做点特别的吧。

options.text: That’s great, but I’m on a budget this month.
Wow, congrats! How about a fancy dinner? My treat!
I heard you’re changing jobs. Is that true?
I don’t like going out on weekends.

content.explanation: 正确答案热情回应成就，用 'fancy dinner' 和 'My treat!' 符合提议庆祝的语境，体现自然口语和慷慨态度。选项1虽真实但扫兴；选项3转移话题，不相关；选项4直接拒绝，缺乏社交礼仪。

content.template: We gotta celebrate this! Dinner on ___ this Friday?
content.hint: 表示‘我请客’的口语表达

content.template: You deserve every bit of it. Let’s ___ it a night to remember!
content.hint: 提升庆祝氛围的核心动词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配：make it a night to remember

content.template: I’ve been ___ to treat you anyway—let’s go out this weekend!
content.hint: 表达‘一直想做某事’的强烈口语表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：be dying to do（渴望做某事）

content.speakerText: We gotta celebrate this! Dinner on me this Friday?
content.speakerTextCn: 咱们得庆祝一下！这周五我请客吃饭？
expectedAnswers: Absolutely! I’ve been dying to treat you anyway.
That’s so kind of you—I’ll bring wine and good vibes!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：积极回应庆祝提议，不拒绝
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当口语词汇（如gotta, on me）
表达自然度：语气热情，符合朋友间自然对话
关键词覆盖：使用 treat / celebrate / dinner 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’m so grateful—this means a lot to me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很感激，这对我意义重大。
expectedAnswers: You deserve every bit of it. Let’s make it a night to remember!
I’m just happy for you. Drinks after work tomorrow?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：肯定对方成就并延续庆祝氛围
语言准确性：使用恰当情感表达（deserve, make it a night to remember）
表达自然度：语气真诚，不夸张也不冷淡
关键词覆盖：使用 grateful / deserve / celebrate / drinks 等关键词

content.speakerText: I just finished my project after months of hard work!
content.speakerTextCn: 我终于完成了这个花了好几个月的项目！
expectedAnswers: That’s amazing! Let’s go out for a fancy dinner—I’m buying!
Wow, you killed it! How about a toast at my place this weekend?
So proud of you! Let’s celebrate with your favorite food!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：识别成就并主动提议庆祝
语言准确性：使用自然口语表达（killed it, I’m buying, toast）
表达自然度：语气热情、有感染力，符合朋友间庆祝语境
关键词覆盖：使用 celebrate / dinner / toast / hard work 等场景关键词
